interfaces.name: -p --output-format stream-json
interfaces.note: Primary deep-adapter surface. Realtime streaming output.

interfaces.name: --input-format stream-json
interfaces.note: Required to answer permission_request upstream. The request/response round-trip is NOT run-loop-proven (R-01).

per_action_approval.reason: --permission-mode manual + bidirectional stream-json are documented in help text. The permission_request stream-json message shape and the approval response round-trip are NOT help-text-proven and require a real run-loop spike (R-01). The spike parser models a representative permission_request message (event_parser.py, INFERRED).

sandbox_policy.reason: No codex-style --sandbox flag. Risk is bounded via --permission-mode, --allowedTools/--disallowedTools, --max-budget-usd and workspace trust.

notes: approval_mode TARGETS per_action (manual mode). This is INFERRED, not run-loop-proven; the spike's parser models a representative permission_request message but real captures are needed (R-01).
Claude non-interactive -p skips the workspace trust prompt; kruon must perform workspace trust in its own onboarding (findings.md).
bypassPermissions mode is forbidden in kruon (DANGEROUS_FLAGS guard in capability_manifest.py).
